title: Leviathan Axe - God of War
description: This texture pack adds an axe from the well known game God of War
body:
### Leviathan Axe - God of War

This texture pack adds the Leviathan axe from God of War to the game, replacing the nonzero axe with it. Features a blue glow like in the original game, which is also visible at night.This texture pack adds the axe from the well known game God of War
